title: V-Malaysia September 2025 Day 5 Highlights: The Best is Yet to Come!
description: Thousands of dreamers have fully evolved into empowered champions on Day 5!
thumbnail: assets/images/09232025 VMY2025 SEPT highlights DAY 5 v4 web.webp
speaker: Highlights

title: V-Malaysia September 2025 Day 5: Choose to Be a Warrior by Chief Pathman Senathirajah
description: “A warrior doesn’t care about rejections. A warrior only focuses on their dreams.” Watch Chief Pathman Senathirajah at V-Malaysia September 2025 Day 5!
speaker: Chief

title: V-Malaysia September 2025 Day 3: Mastering Change with the Three A’s by Joseph ‘Japadas’ Bismark
description: “To change your mindset, you must adapt, adjust, and accommodate.” Watch Joseph ‘Japadas’ Bismark at V-Malaysia September 2025 Day 3!
speaker: Japa

title: V-Malaysia September 2025 Day 1: One Percent at a Time by Dato Sri Vijay Eswaran
description: “Every single day, you need to focus on one thing: you need to be just one percent better.” Watch Dato Sri Vijay Eswaran at V-Malaysia September 2025 Day 1!
speaker: Dato

title: Grand Finale Wrap-Up
description: Official summary of the closing ceremony.
speaker: Wrap up
